positive: Minimalist geometric mountain range silhouetted against a vibrant sunset sky. The scene features clean, interlocking polygonal peaks that create a sense of depth and scale. The style should be vector art mixed with watercolor texture, using deep indigo, burnt orange, dusty lavender, and warm gold tones. The composition must be perfectly centered and vertically balanced, designed for apparel printing. Focus on strong, crisp lines and smooth color gradients, achieving high contrast between the stark black mountain silhouette and the richly colored sky. Flat graphic design meets sublime nature landscape, centered, symmetrical, high detail, printable.
negative: blur, grainy, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, dirty, low resolution, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoonish, photorealism, graffiti, messy, cluttered, noise, gradients (too many)
